mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') as month, SUM(CASE WHEN e.debit > 0 AND a.type = 'asset' THEN e.debit ELSE 0 END) as income, SUM(CASE WHEN e.credit > 0 AND a.type = 'asset' THEN e.credit ELSE 0 END) as expense FROM transaction t JOIN entry e ON e.transaction_id = t.id JOIN account a ON a.id = e.account_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, SUM(e.debit) as amount, COUNT(*) as transactionCount FROM transaction t JOIN entry e ON e.transaction_id = t.id JOIN category c ON c.id = e.account_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.is_deleted = 0 AND c.type = #{type} AND t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT date as date, SUM(CASE WHEN e.account_id = #{accountId} AND e.debit > 0 THEN e.debit WHEN e.account_id = #{accountId} AND e.credit > 0 THEN -e.credit ELSE 0 END) as balance FROM transaction t JOIN entry e ON e.transaction_id = t.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY t.date ORDER BY t.date
